### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://aq.qq.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Faq.qq.com%2F) ### Comment > (p.s.:请与#235755 同步处理). > 应用程序无法正常登录，提示网络异常。 > 已尝试解除对h.trace.qq.com与rmonitor.qq.com的屏蔽（额外包括#235755 提到的域名），没有改善问题。 > 对此应用的HTTPS过滤是默认关闭的，没有开启（将在#235755 中稍后说明）。 > 当前发现问题的设备**不支持安装** *夜间38版本*。 > 如*无法解决这个问题*，建议不对QQ安全中心（应用程序）进行路由。 ``` Username: @Tayg2048 ``` ### Screenshots

issue.title: Fix #235399 streamverde.net

comment.body: There's also Adcash coming from this script: `https://streamverde.net/core-metrics.js`. I think you can block that request.

issue.title: Upd #232310 player.videasy.to

comment.body:
I think

```adblock
@@||api.*/seed?mediaId=$third-party,xmlhttprequest,stealth=referrer
```

is enough. The `seed?mediaId` is already quite unique.

Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

### Add your comment and screenshots

### Issue:
The sites search function doesn't work.

### Problem filter:
* **AdGuard Tracking Protection filter**

### Problem rules:
```
||cdn.clerk.io/clerk.js
||api.clerk.io/v*/log/
```
### Possible fix:
```
@@||cdn.clerk.io/clerk.js$domain=avxperten.*
@@||api.clerk.io/v*/log/click?payload=$domain=avxperten.*
```
### Elaboration:
The first withelisting rule is needed for search results to be shown.
The second whitelisting rule is needed in order to be able to click on the results.

labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://webmail.your-server.de/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwebmail.your-server.de%2F)

### Comment
> Seit gestern wird vom Adguard DNS die Mailserver von Hetzner blockiert. Betroffen ist das webmail aber auch der Mailabruf über SMTP über mail.your-server.de. Eventuell ist die ganze Domain blockiert? Das ist ein Fehler. Hetzner ist ein seriöser Anbieter aus Deutschland. Bitte die Blockierung aufheben.



### Screenshots

DNS setup: | Router
DNS server: | Default
System version: | `FritzBox7530AX`
Browser: | Firefox

comment.body:
不是DNS的问题。这个域名在AdGuard网络钓鱼和恶意域数据库中。在设备端直接被屏蔽了，甚至没有发送请求到DNS服务器。  
将在稍后通过bot提交信息。

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.title: mail.your-server.de

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://mail.your-server.de/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmail.your-server.de%2F) ### Comment > Summary > > AdGuard Home Safe Browsing (adguard-malware-shavar) incorrectly blocks > the official Hetzner Managed Email server hostname mail.your-server.de. > > This causes IMAP and SMTP connections to fail because AdGuard returns > the Safe Browsing blocking IP instead of the real IP address. > > Steps to reproduce > > 1. Enable Safe Browsing in AdGuard Home. > 2. Query the hostname: > > dig mail.your-server.de > > 3. AdGuard Home returns: > > 94.140.14.33 > > Query Log: > > Status: Blocked Threats > Rule: adguard-malware-shavar > > 4. IMAP and SMTP connections fail because the blocking IP does not > provide these services. > > Expected behavior > > mail.your-server.de should resolve to the official Hetzner server: > > 78.46.5.205 > > IMAP (993), SMTP (465/587) and TLS work correctly when the hostname > resolves to the correct IP. > > Verification: > > openssl s_client -connect 78.46.5.205:993 -servername mail.your-server.de > > The TLS handshake succeeds and the certificate for *.your-server.de is > valid. > > Additional information > > The hostname is officially documented by Hetzner for Managed Email: > > https://docs.hetzner.com/de/managed/email/set-up-email-account/setting-up-an-email-account/ > > This appears to be a false positive in the Safe Browsing database > (adguard-malware-shavar). > ``` Username: @tomorbit ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/tn5mkik2ik0sko8sw0ogco8wk88w4k0apcxo2x7qo8.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/g09t36z2srccg0s48cc4g04g4ss4wogsr7hga4nqcg.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/lya9t60743k040og8kkgk80wwkow8c0i8mq3l9p9vw.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| Platform: | Adguard Home v0.107.77 System version: | `Linux, Docker` Browser: | IMAP, SMTP Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter Other extensions used: | `Adguard Werbeblocker, DeepL, KeePassXC Browser, Tampermonkey 5.5.0`

comment.body:
> how to reproduce these breakages?(pls write in english)

1. Please make sure the app is logged into at least one account.  
2. Enable AdGuard, ensure the app's traffic is routed through it, and then clear the app cache.  
3. Reopen the app and tap the "More" button on the bottom right.  
4. Tap the "+" icon in the blue area at the top.  

This will take you to the screen where I found the issue. Agree to the terms, then tap log in to reproduce it.

issue.title: www.boredpanda.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.title: www.boredpanda.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://aq.qq.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Faq.qq.com%2F) ### Comment > (p.s.:请与#235755 同步处理). > 应用程序无法正常登录，提示网络异常。 > 已尝试解除对h.trace.qq.com与rmonitor.qq.com的屏蔽（额外包括#235755 提到的域名），没有改善问题。 > 对此应用的HTTPS过滤是默认关闭的，没有开启（将在#235755 中稍后说明）。 > 当前发现问题的设备**不支持安装** *夜间38版本*。 > 如*无法解决这个问题*，建议不对QQ安全中心（应用程序）进行路由。 ``` Username: @Tayg2048 ``` ### Screenshots

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://adguard.com/kb/fr/guides/report-website/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fadguard.com%2Fkb%2Ffr%2Fguides%2Freport-website%2F) ### Comment > bonjour, > j'utilise des extensions de cashback sur chrome. lorsque je désactive adguard (à la fois le logiciel et l'extension chrome), tout fonctionne correctement, sauf sur igraal. avez-vous des idées pour contourner ce problème ? > merci ### Screenshots

comment.body:
> it seems that no one there can support me with my issue with your application

Yep, as I mentioned above, this problem is related to the operating system itself.
Did you try reboot?

In https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardForiOS you can create an issue (I can't move this) and give me a link. I will forward it to devs directly.
